commands.review_summary:
The PR raises the Android app and benchmark `compileSdk` to 37, updates CI to install/cache the Android 37.0 platform, and adjusts the workflow guard to compare the installed platform major against Gradle `compileSdk`.

PR surface: Tests +2, Config 0, Other 0. Total +2 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the linked dependency branch rather than current main. The dependency PRŌĆÖs CI logs show AAR metadata failures against android-36, and official Google Maven AAR metadata for the bumped AndroidX artifacts requires compile SDK 37.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should review this together with the linked dependency update and merge it through that branch if the dependency update is accepted.

target.title: fix(android): align SDK for dependency updates
target.body:
## Summary
- Align the Android app and benchmark compile SDK with the AndroidX API 37 requirement in Dependabot PR #95924.
- Update CI to install the actual SDK package name, `platforms;android-37.0`, and adjust the guard test to verify the installed platform major matches Gradle `compileSdk`.

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts`
- `sdkmanager --install 'platforms;android-37.0'`
- `cd apps/android && ./gradlew --no-daemon --build-cache :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest :app:testThirdPartyDebugUnitTest :app:assemblePlayDebug`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --codex-bin /Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources/codex`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Dependabot PR #95924 failed Android CI because AndroidX `core` 1.19.0 and `lifecycle-runtime-compose-android` 2.11.0 require compile SDK 37 while the app, benchmark module, and CI installed SDK 36.
Real environment tested: macOS local checkout with Android SDK command-line tools and Gradle wrapper 9.6.0 from the Dependabot branch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `sdkmanager --install 'platforms;android-37.0'` then `cd apps/android && ./gradlew --no-daemon --build-cache :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest :app:testThirdPartyDebugUnitTest :app:assemblePlayDebug`.
Evidence after fix: Gradle passed `:app:checkPlayDebugAarMetadata`, `:app:checkThirdPartyDebugAarMetadata`, both unit-test tasks, and `:app:assemblePlayDebug`.
Observed result after fix: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 4m 27s` with 77 actionable tasks.
What was not tested: I could not push directly to `openclaw/openclaw` because the authenticated `izshaw` CLI account has read-only upstream permission, so upstream GitHub CI has not rerun on this commit yet.
target.author: izshaw
